10010111011010111111101001101100100111010101101001010001100111101111000000010101000 - ASI: 32

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  111 = 1 * 11
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0101 = 01 * 01
  0110 = 01 * 10
  01000 = 0100 * 0
  01111 = 01 * 111
  000101 = 00 * 0101
  000110 = 00 * 0110
  100101 = 10 * 0101
  101111 = 1 * 01111
  110110 = 11 * 0110
  1110101 = 111 * 0101
  011110000 = 01111 * 0000
  101111111 = 101111 * 111
  0100110110 = 0100 * 110110
  0110100101 = 0110 * 100101
  00010101000 = 000101 * 01000
  00011001111 = 000110 * 01111
  01001110101 = 0100 * 1110101
  100101110110 = 100101 * 110110
  01111000000010101000 = 011110000 * 00010101000
  010011011001001110101 = 0100110110 * 01001110101
  011010010100011001111 = 0110100101 * 00011001111
  100101110110101111111 = 100101110110 * 101111111
  01101001010001100111101111000000010101000 = 011010010100011001111 * 01111000000010101000
  100101110110101111111010011011001001110101 = 100101110110101111111 * 010011011001001110101
  10010111011010111111101001101100100111010101101001010001100111101111000000010101000 = 100101110110101111111010011011001001110101 * 01101001010001100111101111000000010101000
